description: Configure safety protocols for the 'Depression Screening - Fall 2024' survey. The system must send a detailed admin notification to 'dr.patel@clinical-safety.org' only if the 'safety_check' question is answered 'Yes' (code 'Y') using the expression {if(safety_check == 'Y', 'dr.patel@clinical-safety.org', '')}. Additionally, the survey must include a 'Text display' question (code: 'crisis_resource') containing '988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline' that is only visible when 'safety_check' equals 'Y' (relevance equation: safety_check == "Y").
